projectDescription: An immediate-mode .NET UI library with a fluent API, flexible layout engine, built-in animation system, and hardware-accelerated vector graphics — designed to be embedded in game engines and desktop applications.
keyFeatures: Immediate-mode UI paradigm — no persistent widget objects, declarative per-frame UI definition
Fluent builder API via ElementBuilder with chainable style, layout, and event methods
Flexible layout engine (Row, Column, SelfDirected) with Pixels, Percentage, Stretch, and Auto sizing
Built-in animation system: AnimateBool, AnimateFloat, AnimateSpring, AnimateColor, AnimateVec2, Shake, Pulse, OneShot
Property transitions with configurable duration and easing functions (20+ built-in easings)
State-driven styles via .Hovered, .Active, .Focused, .If() conditional blocks
Named style templates and style families with pseudo-state inheritance
Rich event system: OnClick, OnPress, OnHeld, OnDragStart, OnDragging, OnDragEnd, OnScroll, OnKeyPressed, OnTextInput, OnFocusChange
Parent-child event bubbling with opt-out via StopEventPropagation
Built-in TextField and TextArea controls with cursor, selection, clipboard, and mask support
Hardware-accelerated, anti-aliased vector graphics via Prowl.Quill (Quill Canvas)
Background gradients (Linear, Radial, Box), box shadows, backdrop blur (frosted glass)
Element transforms: Translate, Scale, Rotate, Skew with configurable transform origin
Layer system (Base, Overlay, Topmost) with arbitrary integer layer values
Text rendering: plain text, Markdown, Rich text with animation tags (shake, wave, rainbow, typewriter)
HiDPI / Retina support via DisplayFramebufferScale
Cross-platform: Windows, Linux, macOS; backends for OpenTK, Raylib, WebAssembly/WebGL
Keyboard tab-order navigation and focusable element system
Per-element persistent storage across frames via GetElementStorage / SetElementStorage
Packaging: multi-target NuGet package (net6 through net10, netstandard2.1)
publicApiSurface: Paper.Box(string stringID, int intID, int lineID) : ElementBuilder
Paper.Row(string stringID, int intID, int lineID) : ElementBuilder
Paper.Column(string stringID, int intID, int lineID) : ElementBuilder
Paper.GetRootStorage<T>(string key) / SetRootStorage<T>(string key, T value)
Paper.AnimateBool(bool target, float duration, Func<float,float> easing)
Paper.AnimateSpring(float target, float frequency, float damping)
Paper.OneShot(bool trigger, float duration, Func<float,float> easing)
Paper.Shake(bool trigger, float intensity, float decay, float frequency)
Paper.SetPointerState(PaperMouseBtn btn, float x, float y, bool isDown, bool isMove)
Paper.DefineStyle(string name, params string[] inheritFrom) : StyleTemplate
Paper.Stretch(float factor) / Pixels(float) / Percent(float, float) / Auto
ElementBuilder.BackgroundColor / BorderColor / BorderWidth / Rounded / BoxShadow / BackdropBlur
ElementBuilder.Width / Height / Size / MinWidth / MaxWidth / MinHeight / MaxHeight
ElementBuilder.Margin / Padding / ChildLeft / ChildRight / ChildTop / ChildBottom / RowBetween / ColBetween
ElementBuilder.Hovered / Active / Focused / Normal : StateDrivenStyle (state blocks)
ElementBuilder.Image(object texture, Color32? tint, float rotation, Float2? pivot, ImageScaleMode)
ElementBuilder.OnClick / OnPress / OnHeld / OnRelease / OnDoubleClick / OnRightClick
StyleTemplate (fluent: same style methods as ElementBuilder, plus ApplyTo / Clone)
StateDrivenStyle.End() — closes a conditional style block
Easing static class: Linear, EaseIn/Out/InOut, CubicIn/Out/InOut, SineIn/Out/InOut, ElasticIn/Out, BounceIn/Out, etc.
GuiProp enum — all animatable/styleable property identifiers
UnitValue.Pixels / Percentage / Stretch / Auto factory methods
ICanvasRenderer interface — implement to plug in a custom rendering backend
IClipboardHandler interface — implement to integrate OS clipboard
